Footer.tagline: Apostolic Pastoral Diploma. A comprehensive 18-month formation for Spanish-speaking pastors and leaders.

backing.title: Official backing
backing.description: DAP is an education department of <org>Revival & Kingdom Ministries, INC</org>.

Footer.marquee: A comprehensive ecosystem of Kingdom education, government, and leadership

gate.title: Enrollment opens on {date}
gate.description: The first cohort of the Apostolic Pastoral Diploma opens enrollment on {date}. Come back on that date to submit your admission and secure your place.

openPopup.title: ENROLLMENTS OPEN
openPopup.body: The Apostolic Pastoral Diploma is now open for enrollment. Submit your admission today and secure your place before classes begin.

button.label: Get more info
button.ariaLabel: Get more information about the DAP

modal.title: Want to know more about the DAP?
modal.subtitle: Drop your email and I'll send you personalized info about the next cohort. No spam.
modal.privacy: Your information stays only between you and the DAP team.

thanks.bodyNew: We'll be in touch within the next few hours with cohort info. In the meantime, feel free to explore the site.
thanks.bodyDuplicated: We already had your email. We've updated your information with the new details. We'll be writing to you soon.

errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
errors.invalidEmail: Invalid email. Please check and try again.
errors.generic: Something didn't work. Please try again.
